title: Carousel
description: Carousel rotates through a bounded set of slides with shared navigation, indicators, and optional auto-play. It works best for a small number of hero messages, workspace highlights, or richer card-like slides that need more room than a compact list item.
intro: Use carousel when each slide deserves focused attention and users benefit from comparing a small sequence of items. It supports image slides, custom templates, manual navigation, indicators, looping, and auto-play with hover pause.

featureSections.title: Image slides
featureSections.description: The default image mode covers the common hero-banner case: one image, one title, one short description, and shared navigation around them.

featureSections.title: Controls, indicators, and loop
featureSections.description: You can independently show controls and indicators, and disable looping when the sequence should have a clear beginning and end.

featureSections.title: Auto-play behavior
featureSections.description: Auto-play is useful for passive highlights, but keep intervals generous and preserve manual navigation. Hover pauses rotation so users can finish reading.

featureSections.title: Custom slide template
featureSections.description: Pass a slide template when the built-in image overlay is too limited and each slide needs badges, metrics, richer content, or a more editorial card structure.

featureSections.title: Workspace highlights
featureSections.description: A stronger product pattern: use carousel for a small, curated set of highlights on team hubs, dashboards, or landing surfaces instead of dumping long feeds into it.

accessibility.title: Controls
accessibility.body: Previous, next, and indicator affordances are real buttons, so they stay keyboard reachable and expose clear labels such as `Previous slide`, `Next slide`, and `Go to slide N`.

accessibility.title: Auto-play
accessibility.body: Auto-play pauses on hover. Use it only for passive content and keep intervals long enough for reading. Avoid using auto-play for critical instructional or form content that users must parse precisely.

accessibility.title: Images and custom slides
accessibility.body:
Image slides derive `alt` from slide `title`, with a localized fallback when no title is present. For custom templates, make sure meaningful text stays visible inside the slide and do not rely on imagery alone.

| Aspect | Behavior |
| --- | --- |
| controls | native buttons with labels |
| indicators | native buttons with labels per slide |
| image alt | slide `title` or fallback text |
| focus order | controls and indicators are keyboard reachable |
| auto-play | pauses on hover; should remain optional |

apiSections.title: CarouselComponent - ui-carousel
apiSections.lead: Standalone slide rotator for a bounded list of `CarouselItem` data. Supports either built-in image rendering or a projected custom slide template.

blocks.title: Inputs
rows: Ordered slide data. Each item may include `title`, `description`, `image`, `content`, or additional custom fields.
Optional custom template for richer slide layouts.
Automatically advances slides when more than one item exists.
Delay in milliseconds between auto-play transitions.
Shows previous and next navigation buttons.
When true, navigation wraps from last to first and first to last.

blocks.title: Outputs
rows: Emits whenever navigation changes the active slide.
Emits when a slide surface itself is clicked.

paragraphs: Hover pauses auto-play and leaving resumes it when `autoPlay` is enabled.
The component exposes imperative navigation internally through previous, next, and indicator buttons, so most integrations only need `items` plus optional output listeners.
blocks.title: Notes
